text:
I’ve been taking treatment from Dr. Nikhil through online counseling for the past 5 months for IBS.
I’m really happy with the improvement. His medicines are gentle yet effective, and he patiently listens to every symptom in detail before prescribing. Dr. Nikhil’s approach is thorough, and he clearly explains the condition and treatment plan.
I’ve noticed a positive change in my health and overall well-being. Highly recommend Hope Homeo Care Clinic for anyone looking for genuine homeopathic care!

Thank you Doctor Nikhil gaaru. I used your medicine for 1.5 month and I got positive response.

I consulted Gynecologist for my PCOD problem and used English medicine for more than 6 months but i haven't seen any result.

From one of my friend suggestion started looking for a good homeopathy doctor and came to know about Doctor NIKHIL.Booked his appointment and explained all my concerns. Used his medication for 1.5 months and got a positive result. I am very thankful to Dr. NIKHIL.

He is unique doctor I feel, he listen all our concern points and then he starts his treatment. Polite and positive behavior 🙏.

I am grateful for the wonderful care I received and highly recommend Dr. Nikhil Joshua’s homeopathy clinic for everyone confidently
